name: aurago-control-plane
label: AuraGo Control Plane
preamble: Clean vector-like technical spot icons for a self-hosted AI and home-lab control plane. Flat front-facing construction, calm operational character, rounded modular geometry, and restrained brand colour.

construction.grid: 24-unit keyline; live area 72%; generous optical padding
construction.stroke: uniform medium #0D1725 outline with rounded caps and joins; never a dominant filled mass
construction.detail_budget: one core metaphor and no more than four major shapes per icon
construction.fill_rule: flat colour blocks with one pale support surface and no background shadow
construction.color_rule: #2DD4BF and #60A5FA carry the main forms; #DDFCF6 supports; #F4C96B is a small semantic status accent; #0D1725 is outline and tiny detail only
construction.shared_parts: reuse the same terminal frame, server module, circular node, and status dot
construction.motif: a tiny paired teal-and-gold signal dot or short orbit arc in the upper-right area
construction.weight_hierarchy: the navy outline and primary form define each icon; gold remains smaller and visually lighter than the core metaphor

usage: README feature showcase, feature cards, category art, and empty states at 64px or larger
